name: Topsy Turvy Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread butter evenly on the bottom and sides of a 9-inch pie plate.
2. Press the nuts, round side down, into the butter on the bottom of the plate.
3. Pat the brown sugar evenly over the nuts.
4. Roll out pastry for the bottom crust; place in the pie plate over the sugar.
5. Sprinkle apples with lemon juice.
6. Combine flour, cinnamon, nutmeg, and a dash of salt. Toss with apples.
7. Turn into the pie plate; spread evenly to keep the top level.
8. Roll out remaining pastry; adjust over apples and seal.
9. Prick the top with a fork.
10. Bake at 400 degrees for 50 minutes.
11. Remove from oven; cool for 5 minutes.
12. Place serving plate on top of the pie and carefully remove the pie plate.
13. Serve warm or cool.
